resources.string: Client and server are out of sync!
If you’re enjoying Roblox please rate our app.
Do you want to leave the app?
Do you want to log out?
Your version of ROBLOX is out of date and will not work properly. Taking you to the %1$s for an upgrade.
Enter the code we just sent you via email
Enter the code we just sent you via text message
Account issue. Please try again or contact Support.
Feature not available. Please contact support.
System error. Please return to login screen.
Too many attempts. Please try again later.
User not found. Please return to login screen.
Verification disabled. Please check your settings.
Before you continue, we need to verify you are human. Please fill out form below.
Failed to load Captcha - please try restarting the app.
Something went wrong. Please login with your username.
Your credentials are incorrect. Please double check and try again.
Your password or email is incorrect. Please check and try again.
Your password or phone is incorrect. Please check and try again.
Your password or username is incorrect. Please check and try again.
Your email is associated with more than 1 username. Please login with your username.
Your session has expired. Please login again.
System issue. Please try again later. Contact support if problem persists.
"You've exceeded the number of attempts. Please try again later or reset your password."
Your password or email is incorrect. Please wait shortly before logging in again.
Your password or phone is incorrect. Please wait shortly before logging in again.
Your password or username is incorrect. Please wait shortly before logging in again.
Your email is not verified. Please login with your username.
Your phone is not verified. Please login with your username.
Enter your username to reset password.
Please check the email address associated with this account to reset your password.
Check your email for login instructions
Invalid username or no email exists.
You must reset your password before continuing.
Too many attempts - please try after 5 minutes
"By tapping 'Sign Up' above, you are agreeing to our %1$sTerms of Use%2$s and %3$sPrivacy Policy%4$s."
Customize your avatar to match your unique style.
Make new friends and play together anywhere, anytime.
Hang out with your friends and millions of other virtual explorers in a wide variety of social games.
Please agree to our Terms of Use and Privacy Policy.
By tapping here, you are agreeing to the %1$s and %2$s
Something went wrong. Please try again later.
No gender specified, please select a gender.
Please create a more complex password.
This password is not allowed. Please choose a different password
Password must not be your username.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
Password must contain at least 2 digits, 4 letters, 1 symbol, and be at least 8 characters
"Sorry we're unable to generate a username for you. Please enter a new username."
Password must be at least 8 characters long.
Create an account on Roblox to start saving your progress in games.
Sign up for a free account
You have created too many accounts. Please try again later.
This username is already in use.
This username is not allowed, please try another.
Only a-z, A-Z, 0-9 and _ are allowed.
Username can’t start or end with _.
Usernames can be 3 to 20 characters long.
Usernames can have at most one _.
Something went wrong. Please try again.
"TM & © 2006–2018 ROBLOX, 'Roblox', the Roblox logo, and 'Powering Imagination' are among our registered and unregistered trademarks in the U.S. and other countries."
Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipisicing elit, sed do eiusmod tempor incididunt ut labore et dolore magna aliqua.
Please clear the app from the recent apps menu and restart app.
Unable to contact server. Please check your internet connection!
Failed to launch email application.Please email info@roblox.com.
You do not have any apps that can open this link.
Service not available, please try again later.
System error. Please try again later.
Sorry, your device does not meet the minimum requirements to play games.
Turn on chat in your %1$s to chat with your friends
Content was moderated. Message not sent.
An error occurred. Please try again later.
No more friends can be added to this conversation
This friend is already in the conversation
You are no longer participating in this chat
Not everyone in this chat can see your message.
Please type a message to send
This contact does not have a phone number set.
Roblox needs access to your contacts to help find your friends.
Sorry, your contact book is empty.
This feature is currently not available to you.
By clicking \"Continue\", you agree that we will access, store, and continuously sync your contacts. %1$s
We are having trouble accessing your contact book. Please try again in a few minutes.
Roblox needs access to your microphone to help find players around you.
Add nearby players as friends! Make sure nearby members have this page open to be discovered.
Sorry! This game is disabled. Please join another game.
Sorry! This game failed to start. Please try joining another game.
Sorry! This game has already ended.
Sorry! This game is already full.
Sorry! Another game already in progress.
Sorry! This game failed to fetch join script.
Sorry! This game is unavailable on this platform.
Sorry! The game failed to start for an unexpected reason.
Sorry! The user you were following has left the game.
You do not have any apps that can open this link
You do not have any apps that enable sharing
This game cannot be shared at this moment
Your message was moderated and not sent to %1$s
There was an error in sending your message to %1$s
%1$s, %2$s and others accepted your friend requests.
%1$s, %2$s and others sent you friend requests.
%1$s sent you a new private message
%1$s, %2$s and one other user accepted your friend requests.
%1$s, %2$s and one other user sent you friend requests.
Unable to register for push notifications. Please try again.
Billing service is currently unavailable. Please try again later.
There is a pending Purchase with ROBLOX User Name. Please login with User Name: %1$s
You have cancelled this purchase. Need help? Please contact %1$s.
Purchase in process, please try again later.
Purchase not supported. Need help? Please contact %1$s.
This purchase was not completed. Need help? Please contact %1$s.
Please setup Google Play Store to make purchases.
Purchase successful, your product will be delivered shortly.
Please upgrade your Android Version to allow Purchasing.
Sorry, your transaction cannot be completed at this time as you have reached a transaction limit. Need help? Please contact %1$s.
Sorry, your transaction could not be completed.
"%1$s won't work unless you enable Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are missing from your device."
%1$s is having trouble with Google Play services. Please try again.
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are not supported by your device."
"%1$s won't run unless you update Google Play services."
"%1$s won't run without Google Play services, which are currently updating."
New version of Google Play services needed. It will update itself shortly.
Allow Ad to store image in Picture gallery?
Allow Ad to create a calendar event?
